title: Fracttalix: Unified Scientific Corpus — Fractal Rhythm Model, Meta-Kaizen Series, Dual Reader Standard, and DRS Message Protocol for Inter-AI Communication
description: Fracttalix: a unified scientific corpus comprising the Fractal Rhythm Model (FRM), Meta-Kaizen governance series (8 papers), the Dual Reader Standard (DRS), and the DRS Message Protocol (DRS-MP) for inter-AI communication. The FRM describes association dynamics via f(t) = B + A·exp(−λt)·cos(ωt+φ) across scales from quantum decoherence to cosmological structure. The Meta-Kaizen series (8 papers) derives a measurement-theoretic governance framework from six axioms, formalizes the Canonical Build Plan (CBP) with proved monotonic quality improvement (Paper 7), and introduces the DRS Message Protocol for epistemologically grounded inter-AI messaging (Paper 8). The DRS is a verification architecture comprising two protocols: the Dual Reader Protocol (DRP) for text and the Grounded Verification Protocol (GVP) for software. DRS-MP extends DRS to inter-AI communication — the first protocol to carry epistemologically typed claims with full 5-part falsification predicates as structured machine-readable objects in inter-AI exchanges. The DRS Architecture specification formally defines the complete standard including the Falsification Kernel K=(P,O,M,B), six verification tiers, and the machine lingua franca property. Every claim carries a machine-evaluable falsification predicate that reduces to embedded binary logic — a deterministic single-bit verdict independent of human language. Includes Fracttalix Sentinel v12.3, a three-channel streaming anomaly detector implementing the FRM (zero dependencies, 2.6% normal FPR at production defaults). The multi-AI relay system enables autonomous hostile review across 9 AI providers (Claude, Grok, Gemini, ChatGPT, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen, Yi, ERNIE/Llama). 25+ corpus objects, 175+ machine-readable claims with falsification predicates, 21+ AI layers, and full DRS compliance.
notes: v12.3.0: Includes MK-P7 (Canonical Build Plan with proved monotonic quality, adversarial detection advantage, and folded dominance theorems) and MK-P8 (DRS Message Protocol for inter-AI communication — first protocol with epistemologically typed claims in multi-agent messaging). Multi-AI relay system distributing hostile reviews to 9 AI providers. FPR elimination (35%→2.6%) and drift recovery. 175+ machine-verifiable claims across 25+ corpus objects. Meta-Kaizen series — 8 papers. Dual Reader Standard (DRS) — verification architecture with DRP (text protocol), GVP (software protocol), and DRS-MP (inter-AI messaging protocol). Falsification Kernel K=(P,O,M,B) reduces every claim to embedded binary logic. Historical milestone: first DRS-MP v2 inter-AI message transmitted March 14, 2026. Introduced by Thomas Brennan with AI collaborators Claude (Anthropic) and Grok (xAI).
